properties.notes: The November 3, 2020 election page names Rachel Kertz as the District 4 winner, and the December 7, 2020 special City Council minutes record her oath of office. This historical service window ends when the current District 4 term begins on December 16, 2024.

The December 16, 2024 special meeting page includes the swear-in ceremony for Rachel Kertz as Councilmember District 4, which provides the first explicit service-start boundary for the current District 4 term.
